reviews.comment:
Fui a sacar el duplicado de la licencia de conducir, me atendieron excelente y muy rápido, y no me dieron vueltas con la denuncia de la comisaria como en otras sucursales. La recepcionista tenía muy buena predisposición, y todos me trataron muy bien. Muchas gracias!

(Translated by Google)
I went to get a duplicate driver's license. They served me excellently and very quickly, and they didn't give me the runaround with filing a police report like they do at other branches. The receptionist was very friendly, and everyone treated me very well. Thank you very much!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNndzluMTF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Por la licencia, un desastre algunas personas de atencion a la gente " una verguenza". otras, muy respetuosas y amables... hay que sacar la gente que no ayuda.
Despues de mas de 50 intentos en 1 semana llamando por telefono, me atiende una persona del sexo femenino, diciendome, decime que necesitas rapido, que estoy atendiendo gente. Comienzo a explicar que extravie la licencia y el dni no lo tenia, y me dice acercate que no puedo asesorarte, porque estoy con gente.
UNA VERDADERA VERGUENZAAAAAA, esta gente no ayuda en nada a la empresa, no tiene necesidad de estar trabajando en ningun tipo de empresa, y que se vaya a cuidar nenes o limpiar casas

(Translated by Google)
Regarding the license issue, it's a disaster. Some of the customer service staff are "a disgrace." Others are very respectful and kind... the unhelpful people need to be removed.

After more than 50 attempts in one week, a woman finally answered and told me, "Tell me what you need quickly, I'm helping other people." I started explaining that I had lost my license and didn't have my ID, and she told me to come closer because she couldn't help me, as she was with other people.
A REAL DISGRACE! These people are of no help to the company whatsoever. They shouldn't be working for any company; they should go babysit or clean houses.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnX2NDNTF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención es considerada, los fines de semana imposible  cargar combustible. Mucha gente y poco personal.El bar podría estar más limpio.

(Translated by Google)
The service is courteous, but it's impossible to get fuel on weekends. It's very crowded and understaffed. The bar could be cleaner.
